reasoning: Tackling your lactate clearance limiter is key to improving your performance on climbs like Alpine Loop. During your last ride, your average wattage was well below what we need for race day. This session will help you build the fatigue resistance and aerobic capacity crucial for maintaining steady power output over the event's critical segments.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x8 mins at 248W (105% FTP) with 2 mins 212W (90% FTP) recovery between. These over-unders simulate the demands of the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb, practicing clearing lactate while maintaining power.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
